channel.title: cluster on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in cluster on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: Build Hyper-Converged Infrastructure With Ceph on PVE
item.description: Build Hyper-Converged Infrastructure with ceph on PVE” Ceph is really a king of SDS(Software Defin Storage). Opensource. After yeasr evolved, It is enterprise-ready. Today I will builda HCI with ceph on proxmox VE 5.x. Perequest Hardware We need got 3 host each of them have two disk(1 for install proxmox-ve 5.x, another for install ceph). Each host i prepared 2 disk . 128GB SSD for intall proxmox ve . another disk is a 1TB sata(It is really slowly, but for lab testing is enough).
